subject: Geography
title: Digital Twins of Earth
description: A 60-second lesson on Digital Twins of Earth.

hook.text: The EU is building a digital twin of Earth—a real-time simulation of the entire planet.

buildup.text: It will model weather, ocean currents, ice sheets, and human activity simultaneously.

discovery.text: Cities use digital twins to simulate floods, traffic, and building energy use before they happen.

twist.text: Unlike a static map, a digital twin updates itself in real time as sensors feed it data.

climax.text: The map of the future isn't flat or static—it's a living, breathing model of reality.

punchline.text: The next map won't show the world. It will be the world.

quiz.question: What is a digital twin of Earth?
options: A real-time simulation of the entire planet
